ddls:
CREATE TABLE "books" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each book */,
  "isbn" TEXT /* International Standard Book Number (ISBN) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the book */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author of the book */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publisher of the book */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the book belongs to */,
  "publication_year" INTEGER /* Year the book was published */,
  "total_copies" INTEGER /* Total number of copies of the book in the library */,
  "available_copies" INTEGER /* Number of copies of the book currently available for loan */,
  "edition" TEXT /* Edition of the book */,
  "pages" INTEGER /* Number of pages in the book */,
  "book_format" TEXT /* Format of the book (e.g., hardcover, paperback, e-book) */,
  "book_status" TEXT /* Status of the book (e.g., new, used, damaged) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_publisher_id FOREIGN KEY ("publisher_id") REFERENCES publishers ("publisher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the author */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the author */,
  "date_of_death" TEXT /* Date of death of the author */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "publisher_name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the publisher */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the publisher */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the publisher */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the publisher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patrons" (
  "patron_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patron */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the patron */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the patron */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patron */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patron */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the patron */,
  "membership_status" TEXT /* Membership status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the patron joined the library */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the patron's membership expires */,
  "borrowing_history" TEXT /* Borrowing history of the patron (e.g., list of books borrowed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patron_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loans" (
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book being loaned */,
  "patron_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patron who loaned the book */,
  "loaned_on" TEXT /* Date the book was loaned */,
  "return_by" TEXT /* Date by which the book should be returned */,
  "returned_on" TEXT /* Date the book was returned */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the branch where the loan was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the loan (e.g., active, returned, overdue) */,
  "renewals" INTEGER /* Number of times the loan has been renewed */,
  "overdue_days" INTEGER /* Number of days the book is overdue (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_patron_id FOREIGN KEY ("patron_id") REFERENCES patrons ("patron_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "branches" (
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each branch */,
  "branch_name" TEXT /* Name of the branch */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the branch */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the branch */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the branch */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the branch manager */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the branch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fines" (
  "fine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fine */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan for which the fine is imposed */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the fine in dollars */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Date the fine is due */,
  "paid_date" TEXT /* Date the fine was paid */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the fine (e.g., unpaid, paid) */,
  "fine_type" TEXT /* Type of fine (e.g., overdue, lost book) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fines_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., librarian, administrator, patron) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, search) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., borrowed book, returned book) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reservation_requests" (
  "reservation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reservation request */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book being reserved */,
  "patron_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patron making the reservation */,
  "reservation_date" TEXT /* Date the reservation was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the reservation (e.g., pending, fulfilled, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reservation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservation_requests_patron_id FOREIGN KEY ("patron_id") REFERENCES patrons ("patron_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservation_requests_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "waitlists" (
  "waitlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each waitlist entry */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book being waitlisted */,
  "patron_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patron on the waitlist */,
  "waitlist_date" TEXT /* Date the patron was added to the waitlist */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the waitlist entry (e.g., active, fulfilled, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("waitlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_waitlists_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_waitlists_patron_id FOREIGN KEY ("patron_id") REFERENCES patrons ("patron_id")
)
